name: IRC_GEOGRAPHIES
description: This table contains location related data. The values stored in this table may come from different tables like hz_geography, irc_geo_coordinates etc

columns.Name: IRC_GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System Generated.

columns.Name: GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table for generating the FQN.  Reference the geography_id in HZ_GEOGRAPHY_IDENTIFIERS to create the FQN alternates.

columns.Name: LATITUDE
columns.Comments: Used to store Latitude  Information for the Geography for Spatial Proximity and containment purposes.

columns.Name: LONGITUDE
columns.Comments: Used to store Longitude Information for the Geography for Spatial Proximity and containment purposes.

columns.Name: WEIGHT
columns.Comments: A numeric value used to rank the relevance of search results.

columns.Name: CITY_ID
columns.Comments: Element based on hierarchy structure and a foreign key to  the element in HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Element based on hierarchy structure and a foreign key to  the element in HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: COUNTRY_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the GEOGRAPHY_ELEMENT1_ID referencing the country Id in HZ_GEOGRAPHIES table.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
